content:
## Page Section / Title
Logotype

## All Verbatim Text
- **Header**: aisalon Brand Guidelines | by Sightbox
- **Section Title**: Logotype
- **Subsection**: 1.1 ALLOWED SIGNATURES
- **Body Copy**: To allow for smoother and more flexible adaptation according to space, we have established several options and have not defined a single primary version. This versatility ensures that the logo maintains its impact and clarity in various contexts and formats.
- **Logo Variations Labels**:
  - HORIZONTAL
  - STACKED
  - HORIZONTAL WITH TAGLINE
  - STACKED WITH TAGLINE
  - MONOGRAM
- **Tagline**: EMPOWERING AI CONNECTIONS (appears under "HORIZONTAL WITH TAGLINE" and "STACKED WITH TAGLINE" variations)
- **Monogram Note**: This version of the logo is only available for use in small spaces, such as favicons or avatars.

## Visual Elements
- **Logos**:
  - **Horizontal Logo**: "aisalon" in lowercase, sans-serif typeface; clean, modern, and legible; no additional elements.
  - **Stacked Logo**: "ai" (top), "sa" (middle), "lon" (bottom) in stacked, sans-serif typeface; vertical arrangement; maintains brand name recognition.
  - **Horizontal with Tagline**: "aisalon" (primary logo) + "EMPOWERING AI CONNECTIONS" (tagline) in smaller, uppercase sans-serif; tagline positioned below the logo.
  - **Stacked with Tagline**: "ai" (top), "sa" (middle), "lon" (bottom) (stacked logo) + "EMPOWERING AI CONNECTIONS" (tagline) in smaller, uppercase sans-serif; tagline positioned below the stacked logo.
  - **Monogram**: "ais" in lowercase, sans-serif typeface; simplified version for small spaces (e.g., favicons/avatars); accompanied by a yellow warning icon (triangle with exclamation mark) and usage note.
- **Color Palette**: 
  - Primary: Black (logo text); 
  - Secondary: Yellow (warning icon, HEX approximate: #FFCC00); 
  - Background: White (page background).
- **Typography**:
  - **Primary Typeface**: Sans-serif (modern, clean, geometric); used for all logo text.
  - **Tagline Typeface**: Uppercase sans-serif (smaller size, bold weight); used for "EMPOWERING AI CONNECTIONS".
  - **Sample Text**: "aisalon" (horizontal logo), "ai/sa/lon" (stacked logo), "ais" (monogram).
- **Imagery / Photography**: None (page focuses solely on logo variations).
- **Iconography**: Yellow warning icon (triangle with exclamation mark) next to the monogram; indicates special usage instructions.
- **Layout Grid**: 
  - 2x2 grid for main logo variations (horizontal, stacked, horizontal with tagline, stacked with tagline); 
  - Monogram placed to the right of the grid; 
  - Left-aligned text (section title, body copy) in a narrow column; 
  - Generous white space around elements for clarity.
- **Geometric / Decorative Elements**: None (minimalist design, focus on typography).

## Page Layout Summary
- **Header**: Top-left corner ("aisalon Brand Guidelines | by Sightbox"); top-right corner (small logo icon).
- **Section Title**: Left-aligned, below the header ("Logotype").
- **Body Copy**: Left-aligned, below the section title (1.1 ALLOWED SIGNATURES and descriptive text).
- **Logo Variations**: Centered on the page in a 2x2 grid (horizontal, stacked, horizontal with tagline, stacked with tagline); monogram placed to the right of the grid with a warning icon and note.
- **Spacing**: Ample white space between elements; clean, uncluttered layout.

## Design Rules / Guidance Visible on Page
- **Versatility**: Multiple logo signatures (horizontal, stacked, with/without tagline, monogram) are allowed to adapt to different spaces; no single primary version.
- **Monogram Usage**: The "ais" monogram is restricted to small spaces (e.g., favicons, avatars) only; indicated by a yellow warning icon and explicit note.
- **Tagline Placement**: Tagline ("EMPOWERING AI CONNECTIONS") must be positioned below the logo (either horizontal or stacked) in uppercase sans-serif, smaller size.
- **Typography Consistency**: All logo text uses a modern sans-serif typeface; tagline uses uppercase sans-serif for contrast.
